item.title: Paperpile at Cambridge Maths Faculty
item.description: Paperpile at Cambridge Maths Faculty The Faculty of Mathematics at Cambridge has bought a site licence for one year to the Paperpile software for managing PDFs. I’ve written a short overview of why it might be useful for your research. To use the Cambridge maths site licence for paperpile, you will need to create a new google account that is linked to a @maths.cam.ac.uk address. Most researchers in the Mathematics Faculty should have a working email of the form crsid@maths.
